questions.question: Does processGiftWrapEvent log unrecognized kinds at info level with kind number and event ID, then return without ingesting?
questions.actionable_check: Read processGiftWrapEvent in service.ts and verify the unrecognized kind handling block.
evidence_required: Source code of unrecognized kind handling
questions.pass_criteria: Info-level log with kind number and event ID, followed by return (no ingest)

questions.question: Does decryptNip17Message now return results for any kind (no kind filtering)?
questions.actionable_check: Read decryptNip17Message in crypto.ts and verify there's no kind check. Run nip17.test.ts to confirm kind-42 returns a result.
evidence_required: Source code of guard in decryptNip17Message
questions.pass_criteria: Only null guard remains (no kind filter), kind-42 test returns non-null result
